mnemonics: POW! A Miner Finds Gold (Proof-of-Work: Miners solve cryptographic puzzles to find a valid hash, like finding gold, to add a block and get rewarded)
keyPoints: Consensus mechanisms are protocols that ensure all nodes in a decentralized network agree on the state of the blockchain.
Proof-of-Work (PoW) uses computational effort to validate transactions and create new blocks.
Proof-of-Stake (PoS) uses validators who 'stake' their own cryptocurrency as collateral to validate transactions and create blocks.
commonMistakes: Believing that 'mining' is only associated with creating new coins, rather than its primary role in achieving consensus and securing the network.
Assuming all consensus mechanisms are equally energy-intensive, not recognizing that PoS was designed specifically to be a far more energy-efficient alternative to PoW.
